pageDescription: Convert butter measurements between sticks, cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, and grams for cooking and baking

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides measurement conversions only
criticalWarningsList.substitution: Consider recipe requirements when substituting butter types

importantNotesList: Salted and unsalted butter can usually be substituted 1:1
Whipped butter has more volume but less fat per cup
European style butter has higher fat content than American butter
Always measure butter accurately for best baking results

messages.enterInformation: Enter your butter measurement to convert
messages.resultMessage: Your converted butter measurement is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides butter measurement conversions based on standard equivalents. Actual weights may vary slightly based on brand and packaging.

seekHelp.title: Cooking Resources
seekHelp.content: For professional cooking advice and recipe development, consider consulting culinary professionals or using specialized cooking resources and cookbooks.

tooltips.inputUnit: The unit of measurement you're converting from
tooltips.outputUnit: The unit of measurement you're converting to
tooltips.amount: The amount of butter you want to convert
tooltips.butterType: Type of butter affects weight and volume

choose_your_input_measurement_to_convert: Choose your input measurement to convert to all other units
what_unit_would_you_like_to_convert_from: What unit would you like to convert from?
perfect_for_your_cooking_and_baking_need: Perfect for your cooking and baking needs!
select_the_unit_you_want_to_convert_from: Select the unit you want to convert from (sticks, cups, tablespoons, or grams).
enter_the_amount_you_have_in_your_recipe: Enter the amount you have in your recipe.
use_the_converted_measurements_in_your_c: Use the converted measurements in your cooking and baking!
